TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Piyoxo, title = Piyoxo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Piyoxo} }

S.FORM: alang Piyoxo ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Cinkong Song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 228 buwan, 595 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 415 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 180 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 65%, Paywan 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Piyoxo hya' ga Torik. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan alang Piyoxo ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Piyoxo ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Cinkong Song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 228 buwan, 595 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 415 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 180 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 65%, Paywan 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Piyoxo hya' ga Torik. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan alang Piyoxo ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pijoxo ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ʦ~ʨinkoŋ s~ɕoŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pajwan *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na pijoxo ħjaʔ ɣa torik. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan alaŋ pijoxo ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
